name: Waffles
recipeIngredient: 2 cups liquid (water, juice, soy milk, etc.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure dry ingredients.
2. Prepare egg substitute according to directions.
3. Add water, then dry ingredients.
4. Bake in hot waffle iron.
5. Serve with maple syrup, fruit or fruit syrup, to taste.
Prune Puree:
Combine 1-1/3 cups (8 oz.) pitted prunes and 6 tbsp water in a container of food processor. Pulse on and off until prunes are finely chopped. Makes 1 cup. This mixture can be used as a substitute for fat in baking - use 1 tbsp puree for 1 tbsp fat. Stores very well in the refrigerator.
